groups.name: ocoelhogabriel.observability
groups.description: Configuration properties for Ocoelhogabriel Observability Starter.

properties.name: ocoelhogabriel.observability.enabled
properties.description: Enable or disable the entire observability starter.

properties.name: ocoelhogabriel.observability.service-name
properties.description: Service name (auto-detected from spring.application.name if empty).

properties.name: ocoelhogabriel.observability.request-logging.include-headers
properties.description: HTTP headers to include in request logs.

properties.name: ocoelhogabriel.observability.masking.enabled
properties.description: Enable sensitive data masking in log messages.

properties.name: ocoelhogabriel.observability.masking.include-defaults
properties.description: Include default masking patterns (CPF, CNPJ, email, etc.).

properties.name: ocoelhogabriel.observability.sampling.enabled
properties.description: Enable probabilistic log sampling for DEBUG/TRACE levels.

properties.name: ocoelhogabriel.observability.sampling.debug-rate
properties.description: Sampling rate for DEBUG logs (0.0 to 1.0).

properties.name: ocoelhogabriel.observability.sampling.trace-rate
properties.description: Sampling rate for TRACE logs (0.0 to 1.0).

properties.name: ocoelhogabriel.observability.metrics.enabled
properties.description: Enable Micrometer metrics emission for log events.

properties.name: ocoelhogabriel.observability.health.enabled
properties.description: Enable logging pipeline health indicator in /actuator/health.
